notes: These bands back the narrow executable validation checks exposed through validationSummary.executedValidationChecks.
They are screening-oriented acceptance anchors tied to specific reviewed reference datasets, not universal calibration targets.
Callers should match the applicable selectors before treating a band as fit-for-purpose.

bands.note: Mean ± SD hand-cream application loading band derived from workplace nurse-use observations in Schliemann et al. (2012).
Wet-cloth dermal contact range derived from RIVM cleaning-product scenarios for household-cleaner wipe contexts.
